analysis: Loos & Co. manufactures and distributes wire rope, aircraft cable, cable assemblies, hardware/fittings, and CNC-machined parts for aerospace, defense, military, automotive, medical, and commercial markets.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures wire rope and cable, which are the primary products described under Chain and Wire Rope.
codes.evidence: When looking for the highest quality domestic Wire Rope in stainless steel, galvanized, bright carbon steel and a variety of other alloys, we deliver.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures fittings and accessories for wire rope and cable, which fall under fittings for rope, cable, and chain.
codes.evidence: Loos & Co., Inc. has long been a manufacturer of high-quality wire rope fittings and accessories for a variety of industries.

codes.description: Cable, Cord, Wire Assemblies; Communications Equipment
codes.reasoning: The company manufactures cable assemblies, which are explicitly listed under Cable, Cord, Wire Assemblies for Communications Equipment.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures hardware and CNC-machined fittings supplied to various commercial and military industries.
codes.evidence: A recognized leader in the field of Mil-Spec hardware and wire rope fittings, our CNC parts supply to most major distributors and industries around the globe.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures nonelectrical wire (aircraft cable and wire rope in steel and other alloys) as a core product line.
codes.evidence: Loos and Company manufactures and stocks aircraft cable to commercial and military specifications in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and a variety of other alloys.

codes.reasoning: Aircraft cable and cable assemblies manufactured to military and aerospace specifications are used as miscellaneous aircraft accessories and components.
codes.evidence: Loos and Company manufactures and stocks aircraft cable to commercial and military specifications in stainless steel, galvanized carbon steel, and a variety of other alloys.

codes.reasoning: The company manufactures bushings as part of its hardware product line, which falls under bushings, rings, shims and spacers.
codes.evidence: We specialize in manufacturing high-quality Aerospace & Defense Cables, Cable Assemblies, Hardware, Bushings and more.
